description: Beta Program — Add per-user is_beta flag to allow manually flagged users to bypass the APP_MODE gate and access the app on production

userStories.title: Create database migration and update TypeScript types for is_beta column
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to add the is_beta column to the profiles table with a write-protection trigger, and update the generated TypeScript types, so that the beta flag is available in the schema and type-safe in code.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file at supabase/migrations/20260215_add_beta_flag.sql
Migration adds is_beta BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false to public.profiles table
Migration creates protect_is_beta() trigger function that silently reverts is_beta changes unless caller has service_role (checks request.jwt.claims->>'role')
Migration creates BEFORE UPDATE trigger protect_is_beta_trigger on public.profiles that executes protect_is_beta()
In types/database.types.ts: profiles.Row has is_beta: boolean
In types/database.types.ts: profiles.Insert has is_beta?: boolean
In types/database.types.ts: profiles.Update has is_beta?: boolean
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The migration file is run manually via Supabase SQL Editor — Ralph just creates the file. TypeScript types in types/database.types.ts must be updated manually (add is_beta to Row, Insert, Update sections of profiles) since npm run db:types requires a live Supabase connection. See profiles type at line 584 of types/database.types.ts.

userStories.title: Ungate login page and enable Google SSO on production
userStories.description: As any user (beta or not), I want to access the login page regardless of APP_MODE and see the Google SSO option on production, so that I can authenticate before the beta check happens.
acceptanceCriteria: In pages/login.vue: the appAccessEnabled redirect block (lines 101-104: if (!appAccessEnabled) { navigateTo('/') }) is removed
In pages/login.vue: the heading reads 'Sign In' (changed from 'Welcome Back' on line 4)
In pages/login.vue: the v-if="isStaging" condition is removed from the 'Or continue with' divider (line 62) — divider is always visible
In pages/login.vue: the v-if="isStaging" condition is removed from the Google SSO button (line 69) — button is always visible

In pages/login.vue: the useAppMode() destructure on line 93 is cleaned up — remove appAccessEnabled and isStaging since both are now dead code. If no other values are used from useAppMode(), remove the entire import
Magic link form submission still works as before (no regression)
Google SSO button click still calls handleGoogleSignIn (no regression)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: File: pages/login.vue. Three targeted template changes + dead code cleanup in script. The useAppMode() call on line 93 destructures { appAccessEnabled, isStaging } — after removing the gate and v-if conditions, both variables become unused. Clean up the destructure or remove the call entirely if nothing else from useAppMode() is used on this page.

userStories.title: Add beta check to auth middleware
userStories.description: As a beta user, I want the auth middleware to check my is_beta flag so I can access the app when APP_MODE is not enabled. As a non-beta user, I want to be silently redirected to the landing page.
acceptanceCriteria: middleware/auth.ts callback is async (defineNuxtRouteMiddleware(async (to) => { ... }))
When APP_MODE is enabled (appAccessEnabled is true): only checks if user is authenticated, redirects to /login if not — no beta query is made
When APP_MODE is not enabled: checks user authentication first (redirect to /login if not logged in), then queries profiles table for is_beta
Beta query uses useSupabaseClient() to SELECT is_beta FROM profiles WHERE id = user.value.id with .single()
If query succeeds and is_beta is true: access is granted (no redirect)
If query succeeds and is_beta is false: redirect to /
If query returns an error (Supabase error object): redirect to / (fail closed per REQ-10)
If query throws a JavaScript exception: redirect to / (fail closed per REQ-10)
If profile row does not exist (.single() returns error): redirect to / (fail closed per REQ-10)
No beta-specific UI, branding, or modified flows are introduced anywhere
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: middleware/auth.ts. Replaces the current 15-line synchronous middleware with ~30-line async version. The beta check only runs when APP_MODE != enabled — once the app launches fully, there is zero performance cost. Uses try/catch around the Supabase query to handle both Supabase errors and JS exceptions. Depends on US-001 (is_beta column must exist in types for typecheck to pass).
